title: cephaelis purpurea
intro: Cephaelis purpurea, also known as purple foxglove bean or purple foxglove, is a plant species in the genus Cephaelis. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Cephaelis purpurea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
